comment: Golden eval set for the JAN lookup (C2/A4). 20 real oral-care / dental JANs with the brand+category a correct lookup must agree on. Mock mode asserts pipeline shape only; RUN_AI_GOLDEN=1 runs the real lookup and measures recall against these expectations. Includes the GUM/Ora2 cross-product regression pair.
